titleStmt.title: SII 10.747: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 747. (A.R. No. 534 of 1913.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF GŌPĀLASVĀMI AT ĪPŪRU, VINUKONDA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1496 (Śrīmukha)

summary.p: Records the grant of a piece of land by Rāvūri Chennappa, son of Timmā-Nāyuḍu to Tirumala Narasiṅgaya for the purpose of utilizing the proceeds of the land for the daśamī services in the temple of Allāḍanātha of Īpūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śubha
śakavarṣālu 1496 śrīmu
khasaṁvatsara Āṣāḍha su 11 lu rā
vūri tiṁmānāyani komāruṁḍu
caṁnapaṁgāru tirumala narasiṁgaya ki
ccina bhūdānadharmaśāsanaṁ mānā
yaṁkarānaku sāgivaci vinikoṇḍasīma
lōni yīpūranu Allāḍanāthuni da
śamiśāvalaku kuccalakṣētramu vūripaḍu
maṭanu peddiseṭṭi duṁnnicēnu Allāḍanāthu
nisannidhi dhāravōśi yistini Ācēnaṁ baṁ
ḍina dhānyaṁ kōrivalna yennidaśamulaku
vaccunu Annidaśamulu sēyiṁcuvāṁ
ḍavu Ācēnidaśamula puṇyaṁ Allā
ḍanāthuni sannidhini māku dhāravōsi
yistiri kēsaripāṭi kuccalakṣētramuṁ
nu nīvaśāna phalaveṭiṁci śāvasēsi
di
daśamiśāvaku tamu
ḷa saravaya gaṁgayaku
kṣētraṁ kēsaripāṭini ku
ccala mavalikōvulavāri
kēsaripāṭini kuccala vūri pa
ḍamaṭa nallakuṁṭa muṁdara The
Digital edition of SII 10.747 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
